intitule: Reading Comprehension: Participating in Leisure Activities

enonce.texte:
Read the text carefully and answer the questions that follow.

Leisure activities are an essential part of a healthy lifestyle. They help us relax, reduce stress, and improve our overall well-being. There are many types of leisure activities, including sports, reading, listening to music, gardening, and playing video games. Engaging in regular physical activities like jogging, swimming, or playing football keeps our bodies fit and our minds sharp. Mental activities such as reading, solving puzzles, or learning a new skill stimulate our brains and keep us mentally active. Social leisure activities, like joining a club or volunteering, help us connect with others and build strong relationships. However, it is important to balance leisure with work and responsibilities. Too much time spent on leisure can lead to laziness and poor productivity. On the other hand, not enough leisure can cause burnout and stress. Therefore, finding the right balance is key to a happy and fulfilling life.
images: A group of diverse people enjoying different leisure activities: jogging in a park, reading a book in a garden, playing football, and gardening.

questions.texte: What is the main idea of the text?
questions.reponse: Leisure activities are important for a healthy lifestyle and should be balanced with work and responsibilities.

questions.texte: List three types of leisure activities mentioned in the text.
questions.reponse: Sports, reading, listening to music, gardening, playing video games, joining a club, volunteering (any three)

questions.texte: What are the benefits of physical activities according to the text?
questions.reponse: Physical activities keep our bodies fit and our minds sharp.

questions.texte: Explain why it is important to balance leisure with work.
questions.reponse: Too much leisure can lead to laziness and poor productivity, while too little leisure can cause burnout and stress. Balance is needed for a happy and fulfilling life.

questions.texte: Analyse the role of social leisure activities in building relationships.
questions.reponse: Social leisure activities like joining clubs or volunteering help people connect with others, build friendships, and strengthen community bonds. They provide opportunities for social interaction and shared experiences, which are essential for emotional well-being.

intitule: Grammar Practice: Complex Sentences with Coordination and Subordination

enonce.texte: Combine the following simple sentences into complex sentences using coordination (and, but, or, so) or subordination (although, because, when, while, if, since).

questions.texte: She enjoys playing football. She also likes swimming.
questions.reponse: She enjoys playing football, and she also likes swimming.

questions.texte: He was tired. He continued to play the game.
questions.reponse: Although he was tired, he continued to play the game.

questions.texte: They wanted to go to the park. It started to rain.
questions.reponse: They wanted to go to the park, but it started to rain.

questions.texte: She studies hard. She wants to pass her exams.
questions.reponse: She studies hard because she wants to pass her exams.

questions.texte: He was reading a book. His sister was watching television.
questions.reponse: He was reading a book while his sister was watching television.

questions.texte: You exercise regularly. You will stay healthy.
questions.reponse: If you exercise regularly, you will stay healthy.

intitule: Writing a Short Story about Leisure Activities

enonce.texte: Write a short story (150-200 words) about a leisure activity that you enjoy. Use at least three complex sentences with coordination or subordination in your story.

questions.reponse:
Sample answer:

My favourite leisure activity is playing football with my friends. Every Saturday afternoon, we gather at the local football field, and we play for about two hours. Although some of us are not very skilled, we all enjoy the game immensely. Playing football is not just about exercise; it is also about friendship and teamwork. When we play, we forget about our worries and just focus on the game. Because we have been playing together for years, we know each other's strengths and weaknesses. Sometimes, we have disagreements during the game, but we always resolve them quickly. After the game, we often go to a nearby café to have a drink and talk about the match. I remember one day when the rain started to fall, we decided to continue playing because we were having so much fun. That was one of the best games we ever played. Football has taught me the importance of cooperation, discipline, and perseverance. It is a hobby that I will always treasure.

intitule: Writing Health Tips for Leisure Activities

enonce.texte: Write five health tips for people who want to stay active through leisure activities. Use complex sentences with coordination or subordination.

questions.reponse:
Sample answer:

  1. Tip 1: Although you may be busy, try to set aside at least 30 minutes each day for physical activity because regular exercise keeps your body healthy.
  2. Tip 2: Choose an activity that you enjoy, and you will be more likely to stick with it.
  3. Tip 3: If you are new to exercise, start slowly and gradually increase the intensity to avoid injuries.
  4. Tip 4: Exercise with friends or join a club, so you can stay motivated and have fun at the same time.
  5. Tip 5: Remember to warm up before any activity and cool down afterwards, because this helps prevent muscle strain and injuries.

enonce.texte: Write a short poem (6-8 lines) about the importance of leisure activities. Use at least one complex sentence.

questions.reponse:
Sample answer:

When work is done and the day is through,
Leisure brings joy to me and you.
A game of football, a gentle walk,
Quiet moments where we talk.

Although we may feel tired and spent,
Leisure gives our minds a rest.
It heals the body, calms the heart,
A balanced life is work and play.

enonce.texte: Identify the coordinating or subordinating conjunction in each sentence.

questions.texte: She wanted to go swimming, but it was too cold.
Because he was tired, he decided to stay home.
They played football while the sun was shining.
I enjoy reading books, and I also like writing stories.
Although he was injured, he continued to play.
